title: Production Overhaul: Cinematic Frontend & Robust AI-Simulation Backend
body:
## CRIMESCOPE Production-Ready Overhaul

This PR introduces a significant overhaul of the CRIMESCOPE platform, transitioning it from an experimental engine into a high-fidelity, production-ready forensic intelligence tool.

### Key Enhancements

#### 1. Cinematic Frontend (Next.js 14+)
- **Scroll-Driven Hero Sequence**: A 600vh cinematic landing experience using Three.js and Framer Motion.
- **Mission Control Dashboard**: A data-dense, tactical interface for real-time monitoring of simulation streams.
- **Full Application Suite**: Integrated modules for Evidence Ingestion, Knowledge Graph Analysis (D3.js), Multi-Agent Simulation, and AI Intelligence Reporting.

#### 2. Robust Backend (Flask & Python 3.11)
- **OASIS Engine Integration**: Multi-agent social simulation for character-consistent behavioral reconstruction.
- **Intelligence Agent (ReACT)**: Advanced reasoning agent for deep interrogation and structured report generation.
- **Async Pipeline**: Background task management for long-running GraphRAG and simulation processes.

#### 3. Data Intelligence
- **Zep Graph Memory**: Native entity-relationship tracking for building deep crime-domain knowledge graphs.
- **Interactive Reports**: Dynamic risk matrices, incident timelines, and key actor profiles.

This version is designed for analysts and investigators in a law enforcement operations center environment.
head: adityaghoshclg2025-spec:main
